name: Milestone
short_description: Milestone is a first-person walking simulation game set in a medieval fantasy world where you explore anomalies. You can reach the end by carefully observing the changes and finding secrets hidden everywhere.
detailed_description:
Milestone is a first-person walking simulation game set in a medieval fantasy world where you explore anomalies.

You can reach the end by carefully observing the changes and finding secrets hidden everywhere.

  • Anomaly Exploration

Basically, you control with WASD and mouse.

When you find anomaly, go back.

If everything seems normal, keep moving forward.

There are occasionally special items you can interact with, so it's recommended to explore thoroughly.

  • Risk factors

Some anomalies can be hostile and dangerous. Be careful not to lose your life.

  • Escape

According to legend, finding the correct path about 15 times may allow you to escape the cursed place. Of course, this may vary depending on the type of curse.

  • Warning

This game contains visual depictions of severed body parts and human remains, scenes that may trigger photosensitive seizures, depictions of spiders, and sudden horror elements. Viewer discretion is advised.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Indonesian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
